speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Urban vs rural life
questions: Do you prefer living in a city or in the countryside?
Is the countryside more peaceful than the city?
What problems do crowded cities face?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I prefer the countryside because it's more peaceful than the city. Crowded cities often face problems like pollution and heavy traffic.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Predicting city growth
questions: Do you think your city will grow bigger in the future?
Will rural areas become less popular?
What changes do you expect in the next ten years?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I think my city will grow bigger in the future. Rural areas might become less popular as people migrate to cities for work. In ten years, I expect more buildings and more traffic.
